_about: Sample LLM model registry for the Puppetmaster router. Copy to ~/.puppetmaster/models.json (or run `puppetmaster models init`), then edit capability_score and prices to match your actual subscriptions. Anything in this file is user-asserted — Puppetmaster does not benchmark or fetch live prices.

_format.adapter: puppetmaster adapter name: 'claude-code', 'cursor', or a future raw HTTP adapter
_format.adapter_model_name: literal model name passed through to the adapter
_format.tags: free-form tags; routing policies can filter on these
_format.enabled: set false to skip without deleting

models.notes: Cheap tier. Verification, summaries, low-stakes work.
Frontier tier. Architecture, hard audits, security reviews.
Whatever Cursor's auto-routing picks. Cost depends on your Cursor plan; we don't model it (treated as $0 here, but the router still respects capability).
Pin the Cursor SDK to a Claude variant.
